data.title: Bitcoin bull flag and standard profit taking hint at eventual rally to new BTC price highs
data.description:
Key takeaways: Traders expect a Bitcoin price pullback to $90,000, but a bull flag could break out to new highs if profit taking near the range highs reduces. On-chain data suggests the current profit taking is too weak to extinguish Bitcoin’s current price momentum. Bitcoin (BTC) price has spent the bulk of the week pinned below $104,000 to $105,000, which many analysts have labelled as a resistance zone, but an alternative view suggests that BTC is simply consolidating within a bull flag. A bull flag is a continuation pattern that is characterized by a period of sideways price action following a sharp uptrend, and when the structure confirms or breaks from the trendline resistance, the uptrend continues
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-bull-flag-and-standard-profit-taking-hint-at-eventual-rally-to-new-btc-price-highs?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Argentine judge orders asset freeze of key figures in LIBRA project, including review of financial transactions of President Milley and his sister
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: An Argentine federal judge has ordered the freezing of assets of key figures in the LIBRA memecoin project. Investigators are investigating potential fraud related to the promotion of the digital token, including reviewing financial operations related to President Javier Milei and his sister Karina Milei. The judge also authorized the lifting of bank confidentiality protections for Milei and his sister, allowing investigators to review their financial transaction histories to look for signs of improper connections between them and supporters of the project.

data.title: Alabama Man Sentenced for Involvement in SEC Account Breach
data.description:
According to PANews, a judge has sentenced an Alabama man to 14 months in prison for his role in the January 2024 breach of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission's X account. The account was used to send a tweet that temporarily increased Bitcoin's price by over $1,000.

Three months ago, the man admitted in a Washington D.C. federal court to charges of conspiracy to commit aggravated identity theft and device fraud. He assisted others in gaining control of the SEC's account, which falsely claimed that the SEC had officially approved a Bitcoin exchange-traded fund (ETF). Following the tweet, Bitcoin's price surged but later fell by more than $2,000 after the SEC quickly regained control of the account and labeled the tweet as false.

Notably, the SEC announced the following day that it had approved a rule change allowing the creation of a Bitcoin ETF.

data.title: DFDV cooperates with BONK and increases its stake in SOL, with its share price soaring to a record high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Nasdaq-listed company DeFi Development Corp. (DFDV) saw its share price rise sharply on May 16, with an intraday increase of up to 30%, setting a record high. The main reasons for the rise in share prices include the company's announcement of a partnership with BONK, a memecoin community in the Solana ecosystem, and an increase in SOL tokens. Under the cooperation, DeFi Development Corp. will co-manage a Solana validator node with BONK, share staking income, and integrate BONK's liquidity staking token BONKSOL. The day before the announcement of the cooperation, DeFi Development Corp. purchased 16,447 SOL, bringing its total holdings to 609,190 SOL, worth approximately US$107 million at current prices. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Suspect who hacked into SEC social media account to post false Bitcoin ETF information was sentenced to 14 months in prison
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. Attorney's Office for the District of Columbia issued a statement on Friday saying that 26-year-old Alabama resident Eric Council Jr. has been sentenced to 14 months in prison.
Eric Council Jr. was charged with conspiracy to commit serious identity theft and access device fraud, and his crimes were related to hacking into the U.S. SEC's social media account. Previously, the U.S. SEC's X account was hacked and published false information, falsely claiming that the spot Bitcoin ETF had been approved. The false release occurred the day before the U.S. SEC actually approved the spot Bitcoin ETF, which briefly caused market fluctuations. (The Block)

data.title: WLFI USD1 stablecoin integrates Chainlink CCIP to achieve multi-chain availability
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News World Liberty Financial announced that its dollar-backed stablecoin USD1 is now operable on multiple blockchains by integrating Chainlink's Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP). The first batch of integrated blockchains include Ethereum and BNB Chain, and more chains are expected to be supported in the future. The USD1 stablecoin is backed by short-term U.S. Treasury bonds and fiat reserves held by BitGo Trust, and its market value has reached US$2 billion. Through CCIP integration, USD1 can be transferred securely and freely between different chains. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Billion-Dollar Bank Warns 7,537 Customers After Data Breach Triggers Unauthorized Account Access
data.description:
A top 100 US bank just disclosed a data breach affecting the personal and confidential information of thousands of customers. In a filing with the Office of the Maine Attorney General, Arkansas-based Arvest Bank says it’s warning 7,537 people after a technical glitch enabled unauthorized account access.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/16/billion-dollar-bank-warns-7537-customers-after-data-breach-triggers-unauthorized-account-access/

data.title: Filecoin Foundation and Lockheed Martin collaborate to successfully transmit data in space using IPFS
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Filecoin Foundation and Lockheed Martin Space announced that they have successfully used a version of the Interstellar File System (IPFS) to achieve data transmission in space. The test was conducted on a satellite orbiting the Earth. Marta Belcher, president of the Filecoin Foundation, said that IPFS can effectively reduce the latency of space data transmission by addressing content and obtaining data from the most recent copy. In addition, the distributed architecture of IPFS helps to deal with data corruption caused by radiation and ensures data integrity through cryptographic verification, which is critical for data reliability in space environments. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Solv Protocol Launches RWA-Backed Bitcoin Yield Token SolvBTC.AVAX on Avalanche
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Solv Protocol announced that it has launched its yield-based Bitcoin token SolvBTC.AVAX on the Avalanche blockchain. SolvBTC.AVAX aims to provide returns to Bitcoin holders by investing in tokenized real-world assets (RWA). These RWAs include U.S. Treasury bonds and private credits from institutions such as BlackRock and Hamilton Lane. The token generates returns through a multi-protocol strategy involving multiple protocols such as Elixir, Euler and Re7, and the returns will be issued in BTC format. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: XRP Price Explosion To $5.9: Current Consolidation Won’t Stop XRP From Growing
data.description:
The XRP price is once again in the spotlight as a new technical analysis indicates that the cryptocurrency may be on the verge of a significant price explosion to $5. 9 and beyond. According to the analyst behind this forecast, XRP’s recent price behavior is not a sign of weakness but rather a period of strategic consolidation that is building momentum for the next major surge. Consolidation Phase To Fuel XRP Price Explosion Master Ananda, a crypto analyst on TradingView, released a detailed analysis of XRP on May 15
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/xrp-price-explosion-to-5-9/
